statement.p: Ray filled the gas tank in their car to {13\ {\rm gal}}\text{.} When the tank reaches {1\ {\rm gal}}\text{,} the low gas light will come on. On average, Rays car uses {{\frac{3}{68}}\ {\rm gal}} per mile driven. How many miles will Rays car be able to drive before the low gas light comes on?
